rationale: No conflict. Gov't Code §2306.127 governs TDHCA housing program scoring priorities for enterprise communities and colonias. Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption changes are unrelated.
quote: In a manner consistent with the regional allocation formula described under Section 2306.111(d), the department shall give priority through its housing program scoring criteria to communities that are located wholly or partly in:
_note: No textual or substantive relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this housing priority statute.
